name: Karme Choling
description: Karme Choling is a Shambhala Buddhist retreat center in Barnet, Vermont, founded by Chögyam Trungpa Rinpoche in 1970. It was one of the first Tibetan Buddhist meditation centers in North America. Set on 540 acres of meadows and forest in Vermont's Northeast Kingdom, it offers meditation retreats, contemplative arts programs, and Shambhala training.
